title: Ride it
description: Ride It: Why walk when you can ride anything?
body:
![ride it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8b3c5ffab6283e3e0edcf6540e8e16e98c585dc.png)
# Ride It 🐾

Ever felt limited by only being able to ride horses and pigs? Ride It is a lightweight mod that allows you to mount and ride almost every animal in the Minecraft world. From farm animals to rare wildlife, your favorite creatures can now become your loyal travel companions.

## ✨ Main Features

Saddle Up: Use a Saddle and Right-Click on any animal to start riding!

Remove Saddle: Simply Shift + Right-Click on the animal to take your saddle back.

Animal Focused: Specifically designed for animals (non-monster mobs) to keep the experience immersive.

## 🎮 Controls

For flying animals (such as Bees and Parrots), use these keys to navigate the skies:

Spacebar: Fly Upwards

Shift: Fly Downwards

Shift + Spacebar: Land / Quick Descent

## 🐄 Supported Animals

Farm: Cow, Mooshroom, Sheep, Pig, Chicken, Rabbit, Goat.

Wild & Pets: Wolf, Cat, Ocelot, Fox, Panda, Polar Bear.

Unique & Aquatic: Axolotl, Frog, Sniffer, Armadillo, Turtle.

Classic Mounts: Horse, Donkey, Mule, Skeleton/Zombie Horse, Llama, and Camel.
